name: Ahmad
bio: Ahmad runs content strategy, project management, and go-to-market execution for Alphabyte AI. He owns the content calendar, project tracking, and cross-functional coordination that keeps the practice running on schedule.

He works at the intersection of delivery and storytelling — making sure client engagements produce not just results but the case studies, proof points, and published content that demonstrate what Alphabyte builds.

credentials.keyCoursework: Project Management · Content Strategy · Digital Marketing · Technical Writing · Analytics

achievements: Established the Alphabyte AI content calendar and publishing cadence
Coordinated go-to-market execution across multiple service launches
Built the project tracking framework used across all active engagements

footerBio.name: Alphabyte AI
footerBio.description: The Claude-focused practice of Alphabyte Solutions. Mid-market AI from the ground up — citizen development, executive enablement, MCP integration, and autonomous agents.
